description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set on a rectangular plot with a sloped grassy yard. The structure features a flat, dark-colored roof and a combination of light and medium-toned exterior walls, likely concrete or stucco. The front of the house includes a driveway leading to a garage, with a paved entryway and minimal landscaping. Large windows are visible on the main facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The rear of the property includes a private backyard area, partially enclosed by the sloping terrain. Sparse, slender trees are planted around the property, enhancing the modern, minimalist landscaping.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat dark roof, light exterior walls, large windows, and a sloped grassy yard with minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sloped grassy yard, flat roof, and the house set into the terrain.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rectangular plot, driveway, garage, and backyard layout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the house embedded in the slope, visible large windows, and backyard area.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backyard, sloped terrain, and minimal landscaping with sparse trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a paved path, minimal steps, and a simple modern door adjacent to a garage entrance, no porch or decorative columns.
